features: Be kind to your skin with our nourishing Ceramide Eye Cream; Packed with nourishing complex of 5 Ceramides, moisture-locking hyaluronic acid, soothing oats, Glycerin and Vitamin E
Hydrate tired looking eyes; Gently hydrate the delicate skin surrounding your eyes
Our light cream helps strengthen your skin barrier to reduce puffiness and target dark circles
Give your skin the extra care it deserves; Fragrance Free and Vegan Friendly
description: Product Description Hydrate the delicate skin surrounding your eyes with our Ceramide Eye Cream. Packed with a nourishing complex of 5 Ceramides, moisture-locking hyaluronic acid, soothing oats, Glycerin and Vitamin E. Our light cream helps strengthen your skin barrier to reduce puffiness and target dark circles. Give your skin the extra care it deserves! Vegan Friendly & Fragrance Free. Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Glycerin, Propylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Ceramide NP, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract, Ceramide NS, Ceramide NG, Ceramide AS, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Glyceryl Stearate, PEG-100 Stearate, Triethanolamine, Phenoxyethanol, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Sodium Benzoate, Cyclohexane, Disodium EDTA, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Castor Oil Hydrogenated Ethoxylated, Butylene Glycol. Directions Ensure skin is clean & dry before use. Apply a pea sized amount of the eye cream under the eyes and on the eyelids. Use gentle tapping motions until the cream is fully absorbed. Do not rinse off. Safety Warning Avoid direct contact with eyes. Manufacturer Contact Information Produced for: Quest Personal Care Global Ltd, M27 8FF, UK. Quest Personal Care (Ireland), #154, 20 Harcourt Street, Dublin, D02 H364, Ireland. See more
